positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a mystical celestial forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent flora intertwined with stylized crescent moons and shooting stars. The style is a blend of modern ornamental etching and vintage scientific illustration, rendered in deep jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald) contrasted with stark, luminous white accents. Emphasis on clean, bold silhouettes and intricate line work suitable for screen printing. The composition must be perfectly centered and non-directional, with strong contrast between the dark, moody background and the brilliant foreground elements. Minimal negative space but highly detailed. Highly print-ready vector aesthetic, maximalist yet harmonious.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, poorly drawn, bad hands, deformed, cropped, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, disfigured, ugly, monochrome, photorealism
